get.summary: oslc脚本接口-获取所有对象名称

application/json.example:

    "oslc:autoscript": "TEST",
    "oslc:description": "测试脚本",
    "oslc:scriptlanguage": "Nashorn",
    "oslc:active": true,
    "oslc:source": "load('nashorn:mozilla_compat.js');\n\nservice.log(\"新脚本内容\");\nresponseBody = \"{\\\"msg\\\":\\\"更新成功\\\"}\";"
}

        {"attribute": "CREATETIME", "description": "创建时间", "title": "创建时间", "type": "DATETIME", "length": 10, "required": false, "persistent": true, "maximoDefault": "&SYSDATE&"}
      ],
      "relationships": [
        {
          "relationship": "IBM_ITEM_APPLYLINE",
          "child": "IBM_ITEM_APPLYLINE",
          "whereClause": "IBM_ITEM_APPLYLINEID = :IBM_ITEM_APPLYLINEID",
          "remarks": "所属申请明细"
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "object": "IBM_APPLY_TIEREDCOST",
      "description": "申请单通用阶梯价格表",
      "persistent": true,
      "addRowstamp": true,
      "level": "SITE",
      "attributes": [
        {"attribute": "SITEID", "description": "站点ID", "title": "站点", "sameAsObject": "SITE", "sameAsAttribute": "SITEID", "required": true, "persistent": true, "searchType": "WILDCARD"},
        {"attribute": "ORGID", "description": "组织ID", "title": "组织", "sameAsObject": "ORGANIZATION", "sameAsAttribute": "ORGID", "required": true, "persistent": true, "searchType": "WILDCARD"},
        {"attribute": "TIEREDCOSTID", "description": "主键ID", "title": "阶梯价格ID", "type": "BIGINT", "length": 19, "required": true, "persistent": true, "canAutonumber": true},
        {"attribute": "OWNERID", "description": "所有者ID", "title": "所有者ID", "type": "UPPER", "length": 50, "required": false, "persistent": true, "sameAsObject": "IBM_TIEREDCOST", "sameAsAttribute": "OWNERID", "searchType": "WILDCARD"},
        {"attribute": "OWNERTABLE", "description": "所有者表名", "title": "所有者表", "type": "UPPER", "length": 50, "required": false, "persistent": true, "sameAsObject": "IBM_TIEREDCOST", "sameAsAttribute": "OWNERTABLE", "searchType": "WILDCARD", "maximoDefault": "&OWNERNAME&"},
        {"attribute": "COSTTYPE", "description": "价格类型", "title": "价格类型", "type": "UPPER", "length": 20, "required": false, "persistent": true, "sameAsObject": "IBM_TIEREDCOST", "sameAsAttribute": "COSTTYPE", "searchType": "WILDCARD"},
        {"attribute": "SN", "description": "序号", "title": "序号", "type": "INTEGER", "length": 12, "required": false, "persistent": true, "sameAsObject": "IBM_TIEREDCOST", "sameAsAttribute": "SN"},
        {"attribute": "MINQUANTITY", "description": "起始数量", "title": "起始数量", "type": "DECIMAL", "length": 15, "scale": 2, "required": false, "persistent": true, "sameAsObject": "IBM_TIEREDCOST", "sameAsAttribute": "MINQUANTITY"},
        {"attribute": "MAXQUANTITY", "description": "结束数量", "title": "结束数量", "type": "DECIMAL", "length": 15, "scale": 2, "required": false, "persistent": true, "sameAsObject": "IBM_TIEREDCOST", "sameAsAttribute": "MAXQUANTITY"},
        {"attribute": "UNITCOST", "description": "阶梯单价", "title": "单价", "type": "DECIMAL", "length": 15, "scale": 4, "required": false, "persistent": true, "sameAsObject": "IBM_TIEREDCOST", "sameAsAttribute": "UNITCOST"},
        {"attribute": "LADDERWEIGHTRATIO", "description": "阶梯权重系数", "title": "权重系数", "type": "DECIMAL", "length": 10, "scale": 4, "required": false, "persistent": true, "sameAsObject": "IBM_TIEREDCOST", "sameAsAttribute": "LADDERWEIGHTRATIO"},
        {"attribute": "CURRENCY", "description": "币种", "title": "币种", "type": "UPPER", "length": 10, "required": false, "persistent": true, "sameAsObject": "IBM_TIEREDCOST", "sameAsAttribute": "CURRENCY", "searchType": "WILDCARD"},
        {"attribute": "FOREIGNUNITCOST", "description": "外币单价", "title": "外币单价", "type": "DECIMAL", "length": 15, "scale": 4, "required": false, "persistent": true, "sameAsObject": "IBM_TIEREDCOST", "sameAsAttribute": "FOREIGNUNITCOST"},
        {"attribute": "DESCRIPTION", "description": "描述", "title": "描述", "type": "ALN", "length": 255, "required": false, "persistent": true, "sameAsObject": "IBM_TIEREDCOST", "sameAsAttribute": "DESCRIPTION", "searchType": "WILDCARD"},
        {"attribute": "CREATEPERSON", "description": "创建人", "title": "创建人", "type": "UPPER", "length": 50, "required": false, "persistent": true, "sameAsObject": "PERSON", "sameAsAttribute": "PERSONID", "maximoDefault": "&PERSONID&", "searchType": "WILDCARD"},
        {"attribute": "CREATETIME", "description": "创建时间", "title": "创建时间", "type": "DATETIME", "length": 10, "required": false, "persistent": true, "maximoDefault": "&SYSDATE&"}
      ],
      "relationships": [
        {
          "relationship": "IBM_ITEM_APPLYLINE",
          "child": "IBM_ITEM_APPLYLINE",
          "whereClause": "OWNERID = :IBM_ITEM_APPLYLINEID AND OWNERTABLE = 'IBM_ITEM_APPLYLINE'",
          "remarks": "所属申请明细"
        },
        {
          "relationship": "IBM_APPLY_CUSTOMERLOCATION",
          "child": "IBM_APPLY_CUSTOMERLOCATION",
          "whereClause": "OWNERID = :CUSTOMERLOCID AND OWNERTABLE = 'IBM_APPLY_CUSTOMERLOCATION'",
          "remarks": "所属客户地点"
        }
      ]
    }
  ]
}

  "spi:source": "//增加引用\n/** @type {java.util.Arrays} */\nArrays = Java.type(\"java.util.Arrays\");\n// var variableName = mbo;\n\n// 属性启动点 - 检索列表事件\n// 参考隐式变量\nvar relationObject = \"IBM_CUSTOMERADD\";\nvar relationWhere = \"ADDRNUM=:ADDRNUM\";\n\nlistWhere = \"\";\n\n// 排序\nlistOrder = \"IBM_CUSTOMERADDID asc\";\n\nservice.log(\"当前 listWhere = \" + listWhere);\n\n\n// thisvalue=[\"IBM_STOREROOM\",\"SITEID\"]\n// lookupname=[\"LOCATION\",\"SITEID\"]\n\n//将另一个对象的哪个字段\nsrcKeys = Arrays.asList([\"ADDRNUM\"]);\n//存到当前对象的哪个字段\ntargetKeys= Arrays.asList([\"ADDRNUM\"]);\n\n\nservice.log_info(\"--------\");"
}

tags.name: 脚本编辑器接口
tags.description:
{{maximoUrl}}   http://localhost:8080/maximo   solon-demo 固定值返回

{{maximoUrl2}}   http://localhost:7001/maximo    maximo服务

右上角默认环境右边设置-> 默认环境  环境变量中
将 maximoUrl maximoUrl2 改名替换即可
